title: W.W. Grainger 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for business segments, customer model, product assortment, 2025 sales, operating earnings, inventory services, and distribution-network discussion.

title: Grainger.com
note: Primary product storefront for Grainger's MRO catalog and customer purchasing experience.

title: W. W. Grainger (GWW) Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization reference used for the refreshed company metric and corrected CompaniesMarketCap URL.

title: W.W Grainger PE Ratio 2012-2026
note: Reference for the May 25, 2026 trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: ERPNext GitHub Repository
note: Source for ERPNext's open-source license, public repository, and purchasing, inventory, supplier, shipment, order, and asset-management capabilities.

title: OpenBoxes - Open-Source Inventory Management
note: Source for OpenBoxes' open-source positioning, self-hosting, multi-facility inventory, stock management, and supply-chain use cases.

title: OpenBoxes Features
note: Feature reference for stock movement tracing, units of measure, inventory management, multi-item handling, and integration/export capabilities.

title: OpenBoxes GitHub Repository
note: Public repository reference for OpenBoxes as an open-source inventory and supply-chain management system.

title: Global Village Construction Set
note: Open-hardware reference for modular low-cost industrial machines, decentralized production, and local fabrication concepts.
